title: Amtech T1695 300cm (120") x 4mm Security Cable with Padlock
features: SECURE AND NON-SCRATCHING: This braided steel cable bike lock is perfect for securing several items together has a vinyl coating to protect against scratching
PADLOCK AND KEYS INCLUDED: The security cable is supplied with a 30mm brass padlock (with cover) and 3 keys
SIZE: The cable is 300cm (120") in length with a 4mm diameter
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Amtech T1695 Security Cable and Padlock, 3 m x 4 mm Steel security cabale with vinyl coating to protect items from markings/scratches Cable size: approx 3m x 4mm 30mm brass padlock with cover supplied with 3 keys Perfect for securing several items together
